text:

I forgot, sorry, I find my problem:
 xf86-video-ati
xf86-video-ati-6.14.6
Name           : xf86-video-ati
Version        : 6.14.6
Installed on   : Sun Sep  7 21:47:16 UTC 2014
Origin         : x11-drivers/xf86-video-ati
Architecture   : freebsd:10:x86:32
Prefix         : /usr/local
Maintainer     : unknown
WWW            : UNKNOWN
Comment        : X.Org ati display driver
Shared Libs required:
        libpciaccess.so.0
        libdrm_radeon.so.1
Shared Libs provided:
        radeon_drv.so
        ati_drv.so
Flat size      : 405KiB
Description    :
This package contains the X.Org xf86-video-ati driver.
I think similar problem, but I use FreeBSD 10:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=192382

Installed packages to be UPGRADED:
        xf86-video-ati: 6.14.6 -> 7.2.0_3 [FreeBSD_new_xorg]
Please don't close pr, I will try repeat it, when I install update.
